description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in dark, rectangular shingles. The front facade features a wide, open window section divided into three panes and a single door to the right, both framed in white. The side walls are plain, with no windows or additional features, while the rear wall has a single, solid door. The exterior is clad in light-colored wood panels, giving it a natural and rustic appearance. The roof has a moderate overhang, providing some shelter to the front window area. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a small residential or park structure.
description: A small, light-wood cabin with a gable shingle roof, large front window, and single doors on the front and rear. The design is simple and rustic, with minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wide, three-pane window and a single door to the right, both framed in white, beneath a gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wooden wall with no windows or doors, and the overhanging shingle roof.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a single, solid white door centered on the wall, with the gable roof above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wooden wall and no openings.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhang, covered in rectangular asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: One large, three-pane window on the front facade, symmetrically arranged and occupying most of the front wall; no windows on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: One door on the front facade, offset to the right of the window; one door centered on the rear wall
